c06a7a72-385c-477d-aad6-7a7a84e6c1d0.Text: Melta weapon attacks gain the following bonuses: Damage Bonus(%): +{uip|damagebonus|4fa4dbc023474337990840e305d06fa4}. Single-shot AP Cost: -1 AP (minimum 1). Critical hits do additional base damage equal to the current weapon's minimum damage bonus.

cabcbd5c-e59f-4e49-a001-4b6d54ea2e63.Text: Plasma weapons can now burst fire in addition to the following bonuses: {g|Encyclopedia:DamageGlossary}Damage{/g} Bonus %: +{uip|damagebonus|fdc990cb73114e4d8a7575813936cec9} Hit Chance Bonus %: +5. Critical Base Damage Bonus: + Current weapon's minimum damage / 2 Rate of fire: +2

a8ffba14-8b42-4fd0-b8c2-43ccdfaf9184.Text: Flame weapon attacks gain the following bonuses: Weapon Attack {g|Encyclopedia:ActionPoints}AP{/g} Cost: -1 AP (minimum 1) Max Distance Bonus: +4 Damage Bonus %: +{uip|damagebonus|30ef0b17c93444bb9b0a0169c6fffe06} Burning Damage Affliction: Current weapon's maximum damage + {uip|burnbonus|30ef0b17c93444bb9b0a0169c6fffe06}.

284cc94e-b4f2-478b-9967-721eb6144fa9.Text: Solid projectile weapon attacks gain the following bonuses: Damage Bonus %: +{uip|damagebonus|21d6182a02014531a63f28fe5ff34530} Reload AP Cost: -2 AP (minimum 1) Fire Rate Bonus: +1 Bleed Damage on Critical Hits: Current weapon's minimum damage / 2 Hit Chance Bonus %: +5

8bd043c7-4aca-4315-81ae-ec25ee98913c.Text: The Sweep ability of an axe and the Shove ability of a hammer or mace cost −1 AP less (but no less than 1). Hammers and Mauls: Applies a random trauma if the target fails a Toughness test with a +25 bonus. Knives: Recover {unit_stat|WarhammerAgility|bonus} MP upon a successful hit and do +{unit_stat|WarhammerWeaponSkill}% damage on targets with less than 50% HP. Primitive Melee weapons: +{uip|primitivedamagebonus|2558102cf3d24a52ae8be0f0e898dec1}% bonus damage. Blade weapons: +{uip|bladedamagebonus|2558102cf3d24a52ae8be0f0e898dec1}% critical damage, {uip|bladedodgebonus|2558102cf3d24a52ae8be0f0e898dec1}% dodge reduction, and +{uip|bladecritbonus|2558102cf3d24a52ae8be0f0e898dec1}% critical hit chance.

c7785b19-93a0-4a18-b39b-cc85c865de33.Text: Drukhari ranged weapons deal +{uip|damagebonus|505223dbfb2d4be6a758818c46878908}% increased damage for each DoT affecting the target. All DoT effects applied to a target are increased by +{uip|dotdamagebonus|505223dbfb2d4be6a758818c46878908}%. Drukhari Las Weapons gain +{uip|lasdamagebonus|505223dbfb2d4be6a758818c46878908}% damage and + current weapon's maximum damage.

5dc453dc-f0fe-4a1f-bae2-cc8358348a7f.Text:
Drukhari and Aeldari melee weapons damage scales with AGI instead of STR if its higher
They also do +{uip|critdamagebonus|ba334a21868849f1b198440d0eff98bc}% critical damage, gain {uip|dodgereduction|ba334a21868849f1b198440d0eff98bc}% dodge reduction, and +{uip|critbonus|ba334a21868849f1b198440d0eff98bc} critical hit chance.

b19a55bb-d66d-4fbd-aeaf-ab05085e8bb6.Text:
Aeldari ranged weapons deal +{unit_stat|WarhammerPerception|bonus} base critical damage.
Single-shot attacks gain +{uip|penetrationbonus|d0313fe1cb894406a012329b2c46c48c}% armor penetration.

74316417-b0df-4d28-9b5b-92ec943b7f92.Text: Force weapon attacks deal +{uip|DamageBonus|0618c379e430483bab1a17b2de559bc5} more base {g|Encyclopedia:DamageGlossary}damage{/g}, +{uip|PercentDamageBonus|0618c379e430483bab1a17b2de559bc5}% damage, and have +{uip|ArmourPenetrationBonus|0618c379e430483bab1a17b2de559bc5}% more {g|Encyclopedia:ArmourPenetration}armour penetration{/g}.

411206e0-b73c-4dd5-b151-a3014ce1a7de.Text: Two single shots to one target. This attack has +5 range.

49a7578b-8885-4272-a20c-0ae6822214d8.Text: A shotgun attack that has {uip|Penetration|027e75ab89364049b844a720feca85ec}% additional armour penetration, +50% damage, and applies {uip|Bleed|027e75ab89364049b844a720feca85ec} bleed to all targets hit.

200bbad1-a4be-4e3f-b364-abdd91c2bdf9.Text:
Dual attacks will no longer have an increased AP cost.
An additional attack with the second weapon will suffer no penalties or increased cost if the first attack was either an axe's {g|f:a270dbb75ea44128b951b5d18d0b6bed}Sweep{/g} or a hammer or mace's {g|f:bd5f109c46684a09b07fb13743d2a6d7}Harsh Shove{/g} ability.
